text_block_list.text:
I drop by the library to look for some materials,
only to find Meisho Doto with a friend.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do I have any hope for salvation?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well... The divine messages of the great Shiraoki
are absolute! No result can be undone!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eep, T-Trainer! Well, you see, Fukukitaru is
reading fortunes right now..

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! It appears that a fan from abroad has
concerns about pursuing the path of an artist.
They've come seeking advice!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, Shiraoki has brought me a
warning. That same path comes with great
difficulty—failure is very much a possibility!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh no... that's quite harsh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However... I trust the results of this divination will
illuminate a path!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please, translate this for me! It's due time to put
your language skills to work!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...Would it be p-possible to ask someone else to
do the translation instead?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure how best to put it... I don't want to
hurt their feelings in any way.
choice_data_list: I think you should be honest with them.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I agree with this sentiment! Should you be
wishy-washy, it could invite unwanted misfortune!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You t-two are right. I'm so, so very sorry for
casting doubt on your fortune-telling... Uugh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, I'll do the translation! Be honest... be
honest!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah, well... maybe I... No, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nngh... If this is p-possible, and only if...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I w-would like to include this proverb... or maybe
not...

Meisho Doto has written down a phrase in
English...
"Every failure is a stepping stone to success."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: How do you say that—fail... fail...ure? What could this possibly mean?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, translated back into Japanese, it means,
"Failure is where success begins."

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And, if I follow it up with, "I'm cheering you on in
all of your endeavors," then maybe...
choice_data_list: That would give them a lot of courage.
That would give them a lot of courage.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! My parents would tell me this whenever I
felt down because of my own failures.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Even now, I recite it in my head, in hopes that just
maybe all my many failures will lead me to
something great!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, b-but you don't have to include it! I wouldn't
want the fortune-telling to get messed up
b-b-because of my suggestion!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Quite the contrary! I sense a lot of lucky power
emanating from these words. We shall include
that English line!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Are you s-sure? I'm actually starting to think it...
sounds kind of preachy.
choice_data_list: Let's tell it to them straight!
Maybe we should soften the wording a little...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, if that's what you think, Trainer... th-then,
I'll go ahead with it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's send our response straightaway!
Hehe, the great Shiraoki is going international! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Look, they replied! Give us the translation!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, let's see... "Thank you. I'll take on the
challenge without worrying about failure!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Looks like the proverb really packs a lot of
power!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: It r-really does!

Meisho Doto looks happy to see the requester
respond so positively.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right on that... Um, what would that look
like?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What about expanding on the explanation? We
could introduce a divine message from Shiraoki!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That... could work. Also, it might be good to add
a preface, or... annotations!

All these new additions result in a decently sized
stack of papers rivaling the length of a short
story.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: D-do you think they'll read all of this?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If they do, I can't imagine they would understand
the primary message of the fortune...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, no! I have to try and fix it up!

With a couple more tweaks, Meisho Doto whittles
it down to a perfectly understandable paragraph.
